# Wellington Mota — Product Engineer (Design + Front-end) & AI Specialist

> Product Engineer based in Brasília, Brazil, open to remote work worldwide.
> Owns both ends of the product: UX research and design in Figma through to
> React/TypeScript running in production — no handoff. 15+ years in product
> design, 3+ years shipping front-end. Also ships AI features in production
> (agent orchestration, evals, versioned prompts), not "vibe coding".

## Positioning

Wellington is a **Design Engineer**: one person who researches, designs and
implements the full digital experience. This removes the design→development
handoff, which typically cuts delivery time and rework.

He is explicit that he is **not a "vibe coder"**: AI is used under engineering
discipline — prompts versioned and tested like code, evals with CI gates before
deploy, token/cost control, design system as single source of truth,
accessibility and performance.

## Core skills

- **Front-end:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, REST & GraphQL
- **Design:** Product Design, UX Research, Usability Testing, Design Systems,
  Information Architecture, Prototyping, Figma
- **AI Engineering:** Agent orchestration (MCP), RAG, prompt engineering,
  LLM evaluation (LLM-as-judge, golden datasets), token/cost optimization,
  semantic & prompt caching, model routing

## Experience highlights

- 15+ years in product design; 3+ years delivering production front-end
- Built a design system used by 3 cross-functional teams
- ~40% reduction in handoff time; ~28% increase in feature adoption
- Technical leadership role; works with stakeholders across the globe
- Education: Analysis & Systems Development; MBA in Fullstack (in progress)
- Languages: Portuguese (native), English (advanced — has served UK and US clients)

## Selected clients & brands

Mitsubishi Motors, ServiceNow, Mindtools, KIA, CAIXA, Banco do Brasil, BRB,
Tutory, HyperGestor, Sankhya, Soluti, CareCloud, Wevr, Butterfly IO, Action247,
Grupo SOMA, Animalle, Autódromo Velocitta, Odens (UK), ArtCaffé (Kenya),
Resilience Dynamic, Nomoo, Chris Corsini, Your Digital Media, Monumenta,
Kineo, Tako, Solomon, Cogmo Tecnologia.

## Selected projects

- **Kia Telluride LX** — automotive landing page: layout, UI and vehicle configurator experience
- **Autódromo Velocitta** — brand identity and digital presence for the racetrack
- **Wevr Virtual Studio (WVS)** — interface and experience for a VR production platform (US)
- **The Blu · Wevr** — campaign work for the 10-year anniversary of the VR series (US)
- **ArtCaffé** — visual direction and digital assets for the café chain (Kenya)
- **Odens** — brand identity and packaging design (UK)

## Writing

- [From UX/UI Design to Front-End Development: Embracing a New Chapter](https://medium.com/@wellingtonmota/from-ux-ui-design-to-front-end-development-embracing-a-new-chapter-756f55de93df) — the transition from 15+ years of design into front-end, and closing the design/dev gap
- [Why you should try Hands-off UX/UI documentation like this…](https://medium.com/design-bootcamp/level-up-your-ux-ui-game-why-you-should-do-hands-off-documentation-like-this-6233def429ae) — practical hands-off documentation: user stories, acceptance criteria and Given-When-Then scenarios

## Availability

**Open to remote opportunities**, including international roles. Based in
Brasília, Brazil (America/Sao_Paulo timezone). Responds within 24 hours.
